positive: A sophisticated, stylized silhouette of a leaping wolf howling at a stylized, crescent moon. Below the wolf, incorporate an abstract celestial motif of intertwined cosmic dust and stylized constellations in deep navy and teal. The style should be modern negative-negative space design, resembling high-end linocut or woodblock print, utilizing only deep indigo, matte black, and bright silver accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed as a wearable graphic print with strong visual contrast and clean edges. Isolated on a pure white background. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, graphic design, elegant, minimal, forest magic.
